---
title: "LRP63base: Joint-readiness baseline (no interaction) — letter-sound (LS) + nonword decoding (NW) main effects -> word reading (WR)"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRP63base is the no-interaction companion to [LRP63](../lrp-rli-mech-063/). It uses the same
outcome, data window and **HSGP** letter-sound mechanism $f^L$, and enters nonword decoding
($N$) through the **same** moderator main effect $\gamma_{\text{mod}} z(N)$ as LRP63, with
`include_interaction=False` dropping only the $\gamma_{\text{int}}$ ($L \times N$) term. The two
models therefore differ by *exactly* the interaction, with an identical prior on the decoding
main effect — a clean **nested** comparison.

The purpose is model comparison: LRP63 versus LRP63base asks whether adding the letter-sound
$\times$ decoding interaction improves predictive fit for word reading (PSIS-LOO). Because nonword
decoding $N = \mathrm{NW}$ is a DAG-descendant of the exposure $L$, both models estimate a
**controlled-direct** $L \to W$ effect at fixed decoding, so the comparison is like-for-like.
Decoding is $\approx 57\%$ floored, so the interaction the comparison tests is weakly powered and
the LOO contrast is suggestive at best. All coefficients are latent-GA-confounded adjusted
associations, not causal skill-to-skill effects.

## Model

$$
\eta = \dots + f^{L}(\operatorname{logit} L_{\text{post}}) + \gamma_{\text{mod}}\, z(N),
$$

the same as [LRP63](../lrp-rli-mech-063/) but without $\gamma_{\text{int}}\, z(\operatorname{logit} L_{\text{post}})\, z(N)$.
The outcome is word reading (`WR`, `ewrswr`) with a Beta-Binomial likelihood.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_results_mechanism.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
